# MLRecommender.ModelAlgorithmType.itemSimilarity(_:)

**Case**

An algorithm that compares the similarity from item to item.

## Declaration

```swift
case itemSimilarity(MLRecommender.SimilarityType)
```

## Discussion

The default value is [doc://com.apple.createml/documentation/CreateML/MLRecommender/SimilarityType/jaccard].

## Recommender algorithms

- **MLRecommender.SimilarityType**: The metric by which the recommender computes item similarity.

items.description: The metric by which the recommender computes item similarity.
